landing.heroSubtitle: Your complete, free, and ad-free pregnancy companion.
landing.heroDescription: From day one to birth: baby tracking, 10+ health trackers, duo mode, 250+ names, and PDF birth plan.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for your pregnancy
landing.featuresSubtitle: 10+ free tools to support you from day one to birth.
landing.feature_weeklyTrackingDesc: Size, weight, fruit comparison, and personalized tips every week
landing.feature_healthTrackersDesc: Weight, water, symptoms, mood, blood pressure, sleep, contractions, and more
landing.feature_contractionsDesc: Precise timer with history, duration, and real-time frequency
landing.feature_duoDesc: Share the journey with your partner who follows everything in real time
landing.feature_bumpDiaryDesc: Capture every moment and compare your belly's evolution
landing.feature_agendaDesc: All your appointments organized in one place with reminders
landing.feature_namesDesc: Explore, filter by origin, and save your favorite names
landing.feature_guidesDesc: Nutrition, exercise, FAQ, and professionally validated advice
landing.feature_birthPlanDesc: Create and export your personalized birth plan as PDF
landing.feature_sleepMoodDesc: Log your sleep quality and mood day by day
landing.whySubtitle: What sets us apart from other apps.
landing.why_freeDesc: No hidden premium version, no subscription, no ads. Everything is accessible from signup.
landing.why_pwaDesc: MamaTrack is a PWA: open it in your browser and add it to your home screen. That's it!
landing.why_ivfDesc: The only app that accounts for assisted reproductive technology journeys.
landing.why_offlineDesc: Your data syncs automatically as soon as you're back online.
landing.weekPreviewSubtitle: Discover your baby's development with relatable comparisons.
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about MamaTrack.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of expectant mothers tracking their pregnancy with MamaTrack.

partner.title: Partner View
partner.earlyTip1: Morning sickness is normal. Offer her crackers before she gets up.
partner.earlyTip2: The announcement can wait — follow her pace, not social pressure.
partner.earlyTip3: First trimester fatigue is intense. Take over household chores.
partner.earlyTip4: Go with her to the first ultrasound. It's a magical moment.
partner.midTip1: It's the right time to prepare the nursery together.
partner.midTip2: Food cravings are real. Don't judge, offer!
partner.midTip3: Place your hand on her belly when baby moves — share this moment.
partner.midTip4: Start thinking about names together, it's a fun time.
partner.lateTip1: Pack the hospital bag together and know where the hospital is.
partner.lateTip2: Stay reachable. Labor can start at any time.
partner.lateTip3: Massage her back and feet — she needs it.
partner.lateTip4: Photograph these last moments as a couple, they are precious.
partner.finalTip1: Keep your phone charged and your car ready.
partner.finalTip2: Breathe. You're an amazing partner. Everything will be fine.
partner.finalTip3: The big day: be present, hold her hand, encourage her.
partner.finalTip4: After birth: skin-to-skin is for you too!

healthSync.title: Apple Health / Google Fit
healthSync.subtitle: Export and sync your data
healthSync.compatibleHealth: Compatible with Apple Health & Google Fit
healthSync.appleInstructions: Apple Health: Open Health > Profile > Import > select the CSV
healthSync.googleInstructions: Google Fit: Use import via Google Takeout or the Health Connect app
healthSync.googleFitDesc: Automatically sync your data with Google Fit via Health Connect

testimonials.sarah: Duo mode changed our pregnancy! My partner follows everything in real time, he feels truly involved. We love watching the progress together in the evening.
testimonials.fatima: After 3 years of ART and an IVF transfer, I needed an app that understood my journey. MamaTrack is the only one that handles the TEC calculation. Finally!
testimonials.lea: I spent hours on the name tool with my husband! We each swiped on our own and compared our favorites. We found THE perfect name.
testimonials.amina: The pregnancy journal became my evening ritual. I write down my emotions, symptoms, and reread the past weeks. It's precious.
testimonials.julie: The contraction timer saved me on the night of delivery. Clear interface, big buttons, no need to think. My husband was timing while I was breathing.
testimonials.marine: The checklist saved me from so many oversights! Hospital bag, paperwork, baby shopping... everything is categorized and I check off as I go.
